_comment: Shape of the saved vscode-mssql connection profile the smoke harness expects. This is a TEMPLATE — do NOT commit real secrets. Create the actual profile through the vscode-mssql UI (Command Palette → 'MS SQL: Add Connection' / 'Manage Connection Profiles'), not by hand-editing settings, so the password is stored securely. The profileName/id must match connectionProfileId in environments.json ('smoke-local-container').
password: <entered through the UI — never stored here>
